preview_safe.name: tableable
preview_safe.preview_behavior: Generate Resource table contracts in preview.

preview_safe.name: hasDetailView
preview_safe.preview_behavior: Generate StandardDetailPage metadata and detail view preview.

preview_safe.name: customFields
preview_safe.preview_behavior: Generate custom-field-ready resource contracts where supported.
preview_safe.agent_notes: Do not invent new custom field storage.

preview_safe.name: uniqueCustomFields
preview_safe.preview_behavior: Generate unique custom field contract where supported.

preview_safe.name: importable
preview_safe.preview_behavior: Generate Importable contract and import_id only when enabled.
preview_safe.agent_notes: Never add import_id when importable is false.

preview_safe.name: bulkDelete
preview_safe.preview_behavior: Generate deletion capability metadata when supported.

preview_safe.name: quickCreate
preview_safe.preview_behavior: Generate quick create metadata where supported.

preview_safe.name: floatingModal
preview_safe.preview_behavior: Generate floating modal frontend preview when enabled.
preview_safe.agent_notes: Frontend-only preview until publish is implemented.

preview_safe.name: notes
preview_safe.preview_behavior: Generate notes tab metadata and comments pipe support as needed.

preview_safe.name: comments
preview_safe.agent_notes: Do not duplicate note/comment data in JsonResource unless canonical pattern requires it.

preview_safe.name: activities
preview_safe.preview_behavior: Generate activities tab metadata and related activity action.
preview_safe.agent_notes: Activity associations are separate and must be explicitly enabled.

preview_safe.name: activityComments
preview_safe.preview_behavior: Generate comment pipe support for activity comments where needed.

preview_safe.name: activityAssociations
preview_safe.agent_notes: Do not assume associations without definition flag.

preview_safe.name: media
preview_safe.preview_behavior: Generate media panel and JsonResource media only when enabled.
preview_safe.agent_notes: Alias mediable to media if needed.
